title: source³
description: source-styled physics for the player (adjacent to squake)
body:
[![source³](https://modfolio.creeperkatze.de/modrinth/project/sourcecubed/versions?color=8080ff)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sourcecubed) [![source³](https://modfolio.creeperkatze.de/modrinth/project/sourcecubed/downloads?color=8080ff)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sourcecubed) [![source³](https://modfolio.creeperkatze.de/modrinth/project/sourcecubed/followers?color=8080ff)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sourcecubed)

**source³** (sometimes referred to as **sourceCubed**) is a mod based on Squake that aims to give Source-styled physics to players in an attempt to make the game more enjoyable for players used to that style of movement.

Current changes include bunny hopping, long jumping, trimping, water sharking, custom velocity-based fall damage, and as a bonus; being able to hit entities through grass. Configs are available for everything just listed, as well as general configuration for the movement.

The mod is in a playable state, but we still wish to add and change much more.
